prompts.text: Positional language: "up, down, left, right" — use these words as they move the block. Point in the direction as you say it.
Before moving, ask: "Which direction do you think the block needs to go first?"
Narrate each move: "The block moved right — now it's closer to the green square!"
Ask: "How many moves do you think it will take to reach the square?" — builds estimation thinking.
